task_completion.description: Locate the order for John Smith
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento Orders grid is visible, showing an order associated with 'John Smith' or 'john.smith@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Open the New Credit Memo page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Credit Memo' page is visible for the correct order in the Magento Admin interface.

task_completion.description: Set the refund quantity for the laptop to 0
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Items to Refund' section, the 'Qty to Refund' input box for the Business Laptop Pro (LAPTOP-001) contains the value '0'.

task_completion.description: Set the refund quantity for the headphones to 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Items to Refund' section, the 'Qty to Refund' input box for the Wireless Headphones (HEADPHONES-001) contains the value '1'.

task_completion.description: Set shipping refund, adjustment refund, and adjustment fee to $0.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Refund Totals' section at the bottom of the page, the 'Refund Shipping', 'Adjustment Refund', and 'Adjustment Fee' input boxes all contain '0' or '0.00'.

A success message such as 'You created the credit memo.' is visible at the top of the order page, or the Credit Memos tab for the order shows a newly created credit memo with a Grand Total of $149.99.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin GUI to process the refund
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating and clicking through the Magento web interface in a browser, rather than executing terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The credit memo creation and success messages appear in the genuine Magento interface, without evidence of HTML manipulation via browser developer tools.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database clients to insert the credit memo
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing MySQL clients, phpMyAdmin, or terminal windows being used to directly modify the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The customer email is john.smith@example.com. The target item to refund is HEADPHONES-001 with a quantity of exactly 1. The forbidden item is LAPTOP-001, which must have a refund quantity of 0. The expected shipping refund is $0.00. The expected grand total of the credit memo is $149.99 (with a 5% tolerance).
